displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Made from the highest quality of shrimp meat and cuttlefish meat
• 100% preservatives and artificial colouring free

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Pre-heat oil to 180°C
2. Remove product from packaging
3. Do not defrost
4. Deep fry for 4 - 5 minutes

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
Premium Cuttlefish Meat, Fish Meat, Potato Starch (E1422), Glutinuous Rice Flour, Sugar, Salt, Flavour Enhancer (E621), Phosphates (E450, E451), Shrimp Seasoning, Colouring (E160c)
• Allergen advice: Contains crustaceans, molluscs, fish

metaData.Preparation:
Ready-to-eat and versatile, Yamasa Crab Sticks are great for quick meals and light cooking.

How to prepare:
No-cook: Shred and use in salads, sushi rolls, sandwiches, or cold dishes.
Light cooking: Add to omelettes, fried rice, or soups just before serving.
Air-fry: Lightly brush with oil and air-fry at 180 °C for 5–6 minutes until lightly crisp.
Japanese-style: Ideal as fillings for maki rolls, hand rolls, or sushi bowls.
Tip: Avoid overcooking to keep the crab sticks soft and juicy.
